_meta.description: LLM-generated AST transforms. Edit to customize.

transforms.description: Remove the outer immediately invoked function expression to flatten the scope.
Move function declarations to the top of the scope for better readability.
Extract the CSS style string into a named constant to clean up the _0x54177c function.
Group related state variables like _0x50810d and _0x4f433f used for notification throttling.
